creator: yongari@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Could you boot your box with 3GB memory? You can boot the following 
line to /boot/loader.conf to achieve this. 

hw.physmem="3G" 

Let me whether that makes any difference. 
If you still see system crashes please show me back trace 
information to narrow down the issue.
